message:
feat: major vc_store rewrite and comprehensive clippy/quality sweep

Large-scale improvement to the Vibe Cockpit system (2087 insertions,
984 deletions across 37 files):

vc_store rewrite (crates/vc_store, 859 lines added):
- Rewrite DuckDB storage layer with proper error handling, connection
  pooling, and transactional batch ingestion
- Add #[must_use] annotations throughout public API
- Add doc comments with # Errors sections on fallible methods
- Use std::fmt::Write for string building instead of format! chains
- Implement comprehensive drift detection with z-score severity levels
- Expand audit event system with machine_id tracking

vc_collect (crates/vc_collect, 16 files):
- Systematic clippy compliance pass across all 13 collectors:
  afsc, beads, caam, cass, caut, cloud_bench, dcg, github,
  mcp_mail, ntm, pt, rano, rch, sysmoni
- collectors/mod.rs: refactor registry with improved error propagation
- executor.rs: improve parallel collection with better timeout handling
- machine.rs: expand machine discovery and health metrics
- node.rs, probe.rs: add #[must_use] and doc improvements
- redact.rs, remote.rs, ssh.rs: harden credential redaction and
  remote execution with proper error types
- scheduler.rs: improve collection scheduling with jitter and backoff
- lib.rs: clean up public API surface

vc_query (crates/vc_query, 5 files):
- cost.rs: refactor cost estimation with improved precision
- digest.rs: expand digest computation and caching
- guardrails.rs: add query safety checks
- lib.rs: clean up module structure
- nl.rs: improve natural language query parsing

vc_alert (crates/vc_alert):
- lib.rs: refactor alert evaluation engine
- routing.rs: improve alert routing and deduplication

vc_knowledge (crates/vc_knowledge):
- lib.rs: expand knowledge base with new pattern types
- mining.rs: improve pattern mining with better scoring

Also syncs .beads/issues.jsonl with 10 issue status changes.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
